content.en:
Forty Supreme Dimensional Rules!

Forty-one Supreme Dimensional Rules!

Forty-two Supreme Dimensional Rules!

Ye Tian's supreme dimensional rules are getting higher and higher, and his own strength is getting stronger and stronger.

With the passage of time, the strength of the human race is also getting stronger and stronger, there are more and more human races in the seventh realm, but the human race in the eighth realm has not yet.

In a short period of time, it is impossible to cultivate the eighth realm all at once.

However, in the future, if the human race wants to give birth to the eighth realm in large quantities, it must obtain enough Taihao gold liquid.

But more than ninety percent of the Taihao gold liquid on Taihao Star belonged to those nine huge forces, and it was not easy for Ye Tian to obtain a large amount of Taihao gold liquid, and it took endless years to accumulate little by little.

The birth of Taihao gold liquid is regular and feasible, and it is not yet the time for Taihao Star to give birth to Taihao gold liquid. "Six-nine-zero" Therefore, Ye Tian has no way to obtain a large amount of Taihao gold liquid now.

Fortunately, he destroyed the Ten Pyloric Sects, and obtained a lot of Taihao Golden Liquid from the Ten Pyloric Gates, plus the Taihao Golden Liquid that the Purple Yun Realm Lord gave him at the beginning, these Taihao Golden Liquids can most likely cultivate more than twenty Eighth Realms.

Before you know it, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

this day.

The human race finally gave birth to another eighth realm, that is, Ye Tian's son Ye Xingchen, Ye Tian cultivated him with various resources, plus Ye Xingchen did not pursue the supreme dimensional domain, so after comprehending certain dimensional rules, he directly began to use Taihao gold liquid to impact the eighth realm, and easily completed the breakthrough.

And Ye Tian's strength has also improved a lot, and he has finally created the Nine Realms Supreme Peerless Nine Stars Unified Sword Light, which is even more powerful than the Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Sect.

And his supreme dimensional rules have been raised to the fifty-fold realm, and when he reaches this realm, the Pearl of the Ruins will not help him much.

......

this day.

Ye Tian was cultivating in the human race.

Suddenly, a figure descended, but the other Terrans could not see it.

"I've seen the Lord of the Void Immortal Realm!"

Ye Tian said politely.

Now, with his strength, he naturally knows the terrifying nature of the nine forces in the former No. 9 Multidimensional Territory, and the Void Heaven Palace, where the Lord of the Void Immortal Realm is located, is one of them.

The Void Immortal Realm Lord sent out by the Void Immortal Palace made all the Ninth Realms of the other forces in the Upper Domain dare not resist, which shows the strength of this Void Immortal Realm Lord.

And Ye Tian didn't think that he had the strength to fight against this Void Immortal Realm Lord.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord is polite!" said the Void Immortal Realm Lord with a smile.

Subsequently, Ye Tian invited the Void Immortal Realm Lord to enter the Terran Temple to talk.

"I don't know what happened to the Lord of the Void Immortal Realm coming to my human race?" Ye Tian asked.

The Void Immortal Realm Lord said, "Ye Tian Realm Lord, I want to invite you to join the Void Heaven Palace!"

"Join the Void Heaven Palace?"

Ye Tian was very surprised, he didn't expect the Void Heaven Palace to invite him, he didn't hear that the Void Heaven Palace would invite the ninth realm among the other forces!

"Are you wondering, why did the Void Heaven Palace invite you?" said the Void Immortal Realm Lord.

"Doubtful indeed!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"It's very simple, you have cultivated the Supreme Dimensional Domain Body, and your combat power has far surpassed the other Ninth Realms in the Upper Domain, you have great potential, and our Void Heaven Palace is the only one of the nine ultimate forces that has recruited the Ninth Realm from the outside. "

"If you don't join our Void Heaven Palace, then your limit is probably the ninth realm, and it is extremely difficult to even raise your cultivation to the peak of the ninth realm, the resources in the upper realm are limited, and it is not possible to grow up with good talent, and sometimes it depends on chance and background. "

"Of course, if you don't want to join the Void Heaven Palace, I will leave immediately. After all, for our Void Heaven Palace, you only have potential, but there is no shortage of powerhouses at the ninth realm level. "

The Lord of the Void Immortal Realm said.

"I'm willing to join the Void Heaven Palace!"

Ye Tian immediately said.

He had to admit that if there was no greater opportunity, after a long time, he would at most create a Nine Realms Supreme Peerless Sect, and his cultivation would slowly improve, and he would slowly comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dimension, and he would not know how to go next.

Therefore, joining the Void Heaven Palace is indeed the only choice.

"Very good, your choice to join the Void Heaven Palace is the most correct choice for you. "

"I know you have a lot of clones, so you'd better come with me to the Void Heaven Palace!"

Immediately.

The Void Heaven Palace occupies the Ninth Multidimensional Territory, and it is also the last of the nine Ultimate Forces to achieve the Ultimate Force, and it is also because it is relatively weak, so at the beginning, it was decided to recruit the Ninth Realm from the outside world, but now it has grown, and there is not enough demonic qualifications, and the Void Heaven Palace does not want it... 0

Soon.

Multidimensional Territory No. 9 has arrived.

Ye Tian was the first time to enter the No. 9 Multidimensional Realm, and as soon as he entered here, extremely rich energy rushed to his face.

And he also saw huge multi-dimensional stars in the No. 9 multi-dimensional territory, and these multi-dimensional stars actually combined into a large array to protect the entire No. 9 multidimensional territory.

"This is the multi-dimensional star that we grabbed from the Void Heaven Palace, and the nine multi-dimensional stars are combined into a large array, even if there are more ninth realms, they can't break through here. The Void Immortal Realm Lord said.

The headquarters of the Void Heaven Palace is located on a multi-dimensional star in the middle, but the Void Heaven Palace uses a special way to calm the tearing power of the multi-dimensional star, so that the eighth realm can live here in peace and will not be crushed by the power of the multi-dimensional star.

Whew!!!

The Ninth Realm shuttled through the Ninth Multidimensional Realm, and there were a lot of them.

Among them, the strength of many of the Ninth Realm was above that of the Peacock Realm Lord, and the strength of the Peacock Realm Lord was undoubtedly the most ordinary member in the Void Heaven Palace.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian also saw a powerhouse in the early stage of the Ninth Realm, whose cultivation was similar to him, but his aura was no less than him.

Up to 0.6 dimensional domains!

This one's strength is definitely not much less than him.

"It's worthy of the Void Heaven Palace, my strength is really not worth mentioning here, no wonder the Void Immortal Realm Lord doesn't care if I really join the Void Heaven Palace. Ye Tian thought so.

"It's here!"

The Lord of the Void Immortal Realm first went through the procedures for Ye Tian to join the Void Heaven Palace, but only then did he begin to introduce Ye Tian to the situation of the Void Heaven Palace.

"Lord Ye Tian Realm, our Void Heaven Palace currently has thirty-six thousand people in the ninth realm and eighty-one in the eighth realm, not to mention those in the seventh realm. And beyond the existence of the ninth realm, there are only three!"

The Lord of the Void Immortal Realm said.

"Beyond the Ninth Realm!" Ye Tian was excited, "What is above the Ninth Realm?"

"Above the Nine Realms is the Ultimate Realm Lord!"

The Lord of the Void Immortal Realm said.
